title: calystegia macrostegia subsp. intermedia
intro: Calystegia macrostegia subsp. intermedia is a subspecies of the California morning glory, a perennial climbing plant native to the Channel Islands in California. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Calystegia macrostegia subsp. intermedia include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving muscle spasms, and promoting relaxation. It is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects.
